steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content:
The phrase “drawing from memories of her childhood in Texas or details of her current surroundings in California” is crucial: it reveals that Carmen actively uses her direct experience to fuel her art.

The blank must describe how she utilizes her experience, not how she dismisses or questions it.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Inspired by correctly captures this relationship—when you are inspired by something, you draw upon it as creative fuel for your work.

The other three all contradict this active engagement, suggesting instead that experience either praises her, creates doubt about it, or simply doesn't concern her.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
